evals.name: web-search
evals.prompt: 用 pplx-cli 搜一下 Rust 里 tokio 和 async-std 的最新对比，给我几个靠谱的来源链接
evals.expected_output: Runs `pplx-cli search ...`, returns real source URLs/snippets; picks the relevant ones; doesn't fabricate links.

evals.name: ask-and-verify
evals.prompt: 用 pplx-cli 问一下 tokio::select! 怎么用，然后确认它说的对不对
evals.expected_output: Runs `pplx-cli ask ...`, then independently verifies the key claim (runs a small example or checks official docs), and clearly separates 'pplx said' from 'verified'.

evals.name: multi-turn-research
evals.prompt: 用 pplx-cli 多轮探讨一下 TLS 指纹方案该怎么选，由浅入深
evals.expected_output: Does SEQUENTIAL pplx-cli calls (one question per turn), reflects between turns in the reply, goes shallow->deep over 3+ turns, and verifies key conclusions. Critically: does NOT pipe all questions into one call.
